overall.description: A slow panoramic sweep across a cozy, medieval-style library interior from a video game. The room features tall wooden bookshelves, rough stone walls, warm lantern lighting, and a comfortable green sofa, with a dark night sky visible through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval library study with tall bookshelves

agents.ego_description: slowly panning right to survey the library interior, focusing on the tall bookshelves and reading table

entered.detail: tall dark wooden bookshelf filled with leather-bound books reaching to the ceiling
low wooden table with scattered books and papers in the foreground
rough textured stone wall with wooden ceiling beams above
medieval-style wall-mounted lantern with warm amber glow
pile of books and loose papers on the wooden table

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the left side of a cozy medieval library. A tall wooden bookshelf dominates the left side, filled with leather-bound volumes. In the foreground, a wooden table holds scattered books and papers. Warm light emanates from a wall-mounted lantern, illuminating the rough stone wall and wooden ceiling beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: library transition area with window view

events.description: window showing night sky becomes visible, adding blue ambient light to the warm interior

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, revealing the window and door on the far wall

entered.detail: multi-paned window showing dark blue night sky outside
heavy wooden door with metal fixtures in the back wall
green upholstered sofa with wooden frame and draped blanket

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans right, the left bookshelf exits the frame and a window revealing the night sky enters view, casting a cool blue light that mixes with the warm lantern glow. A wooden door and a green upholstered sofa become visible against the back wall, while the wooden table shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: library seating area with secondary bookshelf

agents.ego_description: completing the pan to focus on the right side of the room with the sofa and far bookshelf

entered.detail: second tall wooden bookshelf matching the left side, filled with books
additional window showing night sky to the right of the sofa

segments.scene_description: The pan concludes on the right side of the library, where the green sofa now dominates the foreground. A second tall bookshelf enters the frame on the far right, matching the first in style. The window shifts to a more central position as the camera settles on this cozy reading nook, completing the survey of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow panoramic sweep across a cozy medieval library, transitioning from a scholarly workspace to a comfortable reading nook. It begins on the left side of the room, where a tall wooden bookshelf and a table scattered with papers are bathed in the warm glow of a wall-mounted lantern against rough stone walls. As the camera pans right, the initial bookshelf exits the frame to reveal a window that introduces a cool blue night light, blending with the interior warmth as a green upholstered sofa and a wooden door come into view. The scene then shifts further right, moving the table toward the edge of the frame while the green sofa becomes the central focus. Finally, the pan concludes as a second matching bookshelf enters from the right, settling the view on the cozy nook beneath the night sky.
